SEARCH

Class CustomerMySQLCRUD

java.lang.Object
CustomerMySQLCRUD
public class CustomerMySQLCRUD extends Object
Provides CRUD operations for Customer data stored in MySQL.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CustomerMySQLCRUD()
    Creates a CustomerMySQLCRUD object.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    deleteCustomer(Connection connection, int id)
    Deletes a customer by id.
    static List<Customer>
    getAllCustomers(Connection connection)
    Reads all customers from the Customers table.

    getConnection()
    Creates and returns a Connection to the MySQL database.
    static void
    insertCustomer(Connection connection, Customer c)
    Inserts a Customer into the Customers table.

    updateCustomerFirstName(Connection connection, int id, String newFirstName)
    Updates the first name of a customer by id.

    • CustomerMySQLCRUD

  • Method Details

    • getConnection

      public static Connection getConnection() throws SQLException
      Creates and returns a Connection to the MySQL database.
      Returns:
      A Connection to the database.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database access error occurs.

    • insertCustomer

      public static void insertCustomer(Connection connection, Customer c) throws SQLException
      Inserts a Customer into the Customers table.
      Parameters:
      connection - Active connection.
      c - The Customer to insert.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If the insert fails.

    • getAllCustomers

      public static List<Customer> getAllCustomers(Connection connection) throws SQLException
      Reads all customers from the Customers table.
      Parameters:
      connection - Active connection.
      Returns:
      A List of all customers in the table.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If the query fails.

    • updateCustomerFirstName

      public static void updateCustomerFirstName(Connection connection, int id, String newFirstName) throws SQLException
      Updates the first name of a customer by id.
      Parameters:
      connection - Active connection.
      id - The id of the customer to update.
      newFirstName - The new first name value.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If the update fails.

    • deleteCustomer

      public static void deleteCustomer(Connection connection, int id) throws SQLException
      Deletes a customer by id.
      Parameters:
      connection - Active connection.
      id - The id of the customer to delete.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If the delete fails.
